metadata.source_note: GitHub production-branch dashboard repair package. Claims remain evidence-labeled and internal only.

decision.label: Founder Decision
decision.detail: Internal product-testing view only. Public or client-facing release requires SA-04 QA gate and Founder approval.

kpis.name: Dashboard Health
kpis.source_logic: Root dashboard is bound to local JSON files and shows evidence status labels.

kpis.name: Evidence Binding
kpis.source_logic: dashboard_state.json, evidence_objects.json, and quarantine_register.json are root-level dashboard dependencies.

kpis.name: Attribution Quality
kpis.source_logic: No certainty claim is made without approved source evidence.

kpis.name: CRM Truth
kpis.source_logic: HubSpot writes are blocked unless Founder explicitly approves.

kpis.name: QA Gate
kpis.source_logic: Browser, responsive, visual, and proof-pack validation are required before client-facing approval.

kpis.name: Release Readiness
kpis.source_logic: No public, client-facing, revenue, ROI, SQL, pipeline, or attribution certainty claims are approved.

items.title: Client-product testing surface
items.body: Internal readiness view only. Public approval is not implied.

items.title: Campaign delivery risk
items.body: Open risk items need owner confirmation before external claims.

items.title: Lead delivery ownership
items.body: Owner actions are staged for review, not automatic CRM updates.

items.title: Channel performance
items.body: Rank by evidence quality before interpreting growth.

items.title: Owner actions
items.body: Execution guidance remains separate from approval gates.

items.title: Blocked or quarantined items
items.body: Anything without traceable proof remains held.
